import heapq
import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

# Clean: lazy % format
def process_batch(items: list) -> None:
    logger.debug("Processing %d items", len(items))
    for item in items:
        pass


# Clean: exc_info=True in except
def fetch_data(url: str) -> dict:
    try:
        return requests.get(url).json()
    except Exception:
        logger.error("Failed to fetch %s", url, exc_info=True)
        return {}


# Clean: heapq.nlargest for top-N
def get_best_item(scores: list) -> object:
    return heapq.nlargest(1, scores)[0]


# Clean: use frozenset for O(1) lookups
def filter_blocked(users: list, blocked_ids: frozenset) -> list:
    return [u for u in users if u.id not in blocked_ids]


# Clean: use enumerate instead of range(len(...))
def print_items(items: list) -> None:
    for i, item in enumerate(items):
        print(i, item)
